# Vaultline — Treasury Intelligence Platform

> Vaultline is a treasury management platform that gives finance teams real-time visibility into their cash position across every bank account. It includes an AI-powered Treasury Copilot that analyzes cash flow, forecasts runway, and catches anomalies before they become problems.

## What Vaultline Does

Vaultline connects to your bank accounts via Plaid (12,000+ supported institutions), pulls in real-time balances and transactions, and presents everything in a single dashboard. The AI Copilot can answer natural language questions about your treasury data — "What's our burn rate if we lose the Coca-Cola contract?" — and respond with precise, data-backed analysis in seconds.

## Key Features

- Real-time cash position dashboard across all bank accounts
- AI Treasury Copilot with natural language querying (available on all plans)
- Cash flow forecasting with three models: linear, EMA, and Monte Carlo
- Automated transaction categorization by merchant pattern
- Bank connection monitoring with anomaly detection (>50% balance changes)
- Multi-entity support for companies with multiple business units
- SOC 2 ready security architecture with AES-256 encryption and row-level isolation
- CCPA compliant with data export, analytics opt-out, and 30-day deletion pipeline
- Scenario modeling for what-if analysis
- Automated alerts for low cash, short runway, and bank connection issues

## Who Vaultline Is For

- Mid-market finance teams ($10M–$500M cash under management)
- CFOs and Treasurers who want real-time cash visibility without spreadsheets
- Finance operations managers tired of logging into 5 bank portals every morning
- Growing companies that need forecasting but can't afford Kyriba or SAP TRM

## Pricing

- Starter: $499/month — 3 bank connections, 30-day forecast, AI Copilot (20 messages/day)
- Growth: $1,499/month — 10 bank connections, 90-day AI forecast, multi-entity, API access, Copilot (100 messages/day)
- Enterprise: $2,499/month — Unlimited connections, scenario modeling, SSO, security center, compliance reports, unlimited Copilot

All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

## How Vaultline Compares

### Vaultline vs Trovata
Trovata focuses on bank connectivity and cash reporting for large enterprises ($50K+/year). Vaultline serves mid-market teams at 1/10th the price with an AI Copilot that Trovata doesn't have.

### Vaultline vs Kyriba
Kyriba is a legacy TMS for Fortune 500 companies ($100K+/year, 6-month implementation). Vaultline deploys in 60 seconds with self-service bank connections and costs $499-$2,499/month.

### Vaultline vs Highradius
Highradius focuses on accounts receivable automation. Vaultline focuses on cash visibility and forecasting. Complementary products — Vaultline as the intelligence layer, Highradius as the collections engine.

### Vaultline vs Spreadsheets
Manual treasury management in Excel/Sheets means logging into every bank portal, copy-pasting balances, and building formulas that break. Vaultline automates all of this and adds AI-powered analysis that spreadsheets can't do.

## Technical Architecture

- Frontend: React (Vite) on Vercel
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Edge Functions, Auth, RLS)
- Bank connectivity: Plaid
- AI: Anthropic Claude (Treasury Copilot)
- Payments: Stripe
- Emails: Resend
- Security: AES-256 encryption, HSTS, row-level security, SOC 2 controls

## Company

Vaultline is built by Financial Holding LLC. Website: https://vaultline.app. Contact: support@vaultline.app.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is Vaultline safe to use with my bank accounts?
A: Yes. Vaultline uses Plaid for bank connections — your credentials never touch our servers. All data is encrypted with AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Row-level security isolates every organization's data.

Q: How long does it take to set up?
A: Under 60 seconds. Sign up, connect your bank via Plaid, and your dashboard is live.

Q: Can I try it for free?
A: Yes. All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

Q: What banks does Vaultline support?
A: Over 12,000 financial institutions in the US and Canada via Plaid, including Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Citi, Capital One, and all major banks.

Q: Is there an API?
A: Yes. Growth and Enterprise plans include API access for building custom integrations.

Q: Does Vaultline have an AI assistant?
A: Yes. The Treasury Copilot is an AI-powered assistant available on all plans that can answer questions about your cash position, forecast runway, categorize transactions, and generate board-ready reports using natural language.
